claim: Self-improving agents: log outputs, collect errors, analyze patterns, update prompts iteratively to progressively improve performance
actionable: Build feedback loops: collect agent outputs, identify error patterns, update prompts/strategies, re-run to measure improvement
source_title: How to Build a Self Improving Agentic OS in Claude

claim: Agents perform better with explicit planning: decompose goals to substeps, prioritize, execute incrementally with course correction
actionable: Teach agents to plan first: break goals into substeps, assign priorities, then execute incrementally with monitoring
source_title: How to Build a Self Improving Agentic OS in Claude
